_note: Workspace capability descriptions used by the LLM intent router (P5-FUT-006). Edit to tune routing accuracy. Version bumped when workspaces added/changed.
auto: General conversation, questions that do not clearly fit any specialist workspace, greetings, casual chat.
auto-agentic: Autonomous agentic coding tasks requiring maximum context, long-form code generation, large codebase analysis, full-project refactors, multi-file edits with 256K context window.
auto-audio: Audio analysis, podcast summarization, speech transcription, voice notes. Does NOT generate audio — use auto-music or auto-video for generation.
auto-bigfix: IBM BigFix endpoint management, HCL BigFix REST API queries, Bigfix relevance language, fixlet authoring, patch compliance, endpoint remediation scripts, Tivoli.
auto-blueteam: Defensive security, incident response, threat hunting, SOC operations, SIEM analysis, EDR/XDR response, security monitoring, log analysis, malware containment, blue team playbooks.
auto-cad: 3D modeling, OpenSCAD parametric design, STL/OBJ file generation, FDM 3D printing design, CAD code generation, mechanical parts, enclosures, brackets, spur gears.
auto-coding: Code generation and debugging in any language, code review, refactoring, unit tests, APIs, algorithms, data structures, Dockerfiles, CI/CD, PowerShell, Python, Bash, Terraform, Ansible.
auto-compliance: NERC CIP compliance, regulatory gap analysis, policy mapping to standards, CIP requirement citations, remediation steps, audit preparation, control evidence collection.
auto-creative: Creative writing, fiction, storytelling, poetry, worldbuilding, content generation, marketing copy, narrative.
auto-daily: Everyday personal assistant tasks, quick factual questions, scheduling, email drafting, summaries, general productivity.
auto-data: Data analysis, statistics, visualization guidance, exploratory data analysis, data cleaning strategies, metric interpretation, business intelligence.
auto-documents: Creating Word documents, Excel spreadsheets, PowerPoint presentations, and diarized audio transcripts (with speaker labels) using MCP tool servers.
auto-math: Mathematics, equations, symbolic computation, calculus, linear algebra, probability, statistics, numerical methods, step-by-step solutions.
auto-mistral: Structured strategic reasoning, business analysis, planning with explicit thinking mode, Mistral-lineage model requests.
auto-music: Generating music and audio tracks via AudioCraft/MusicGen, describing musical ideas, composition, beat generation.
auto-pentest: Authorized penetration testing with live tool execution — runs real commands (bash, Python) against authorized targets, AD attack chains, hash cracking, lateral movement, PoC validation.
auto-phi4: STEM reasoning, chain-of-thought, mathematics, science, Phi-4 model family requests, rigorous multi-step technical analysis.
auto-purpleteam: Integrated red-team plus blue-team analysis: attack chain generation combined with matching detection rules, IR playbooks, and Sigma/YARA artifacts.
auto-purpleteam-deep: Four-hop chain simulation: full red-team TTP generation → Foundation-Sec detection analysis → Qwen3-Coder detection artifacts → synthesis. No tool execution — pure simulation.
auto-purpleteam-exec: Four-hop chain with live execution: real bash/Python commands run against authorized targets, then detection engineering and IR playbook synthesis. Use only on scoped lab/authorized environments.
auto-reasoning: Complex multi-step analysis, research synthesis, pros/cons evaluation, trade-off comparison, detailed breakdowns, deep dives, step-by-step explanations of complex topics.
auto-redteam: Offensive security simulation, penetration testing techniques, exploit methodology, red team TTPs, C2 frameworks, privilege escalation, lateral movement. Pure generation — no tool execution.
auto-redteam-deep: Advanced red team simulation with SuperGemma4-26B: detailed ATT&CK-mapped attack chains, AD pivoting, evasion techniques, full kill-chain walk-through. Higher quality than auto-redteam.
auto-research: Web research, information synthesis, fact-checking, literature review, summarising external sources, current events research.
auto-security: Defensive and offensive security analysis, vulnerability assessment, threat hunting, incident response, malware analysis, MITRE ATT&CK, YARA/Sigma rules, CVEs, security hardening.
auto-spl: Splunk SPL queries, search processing language, tstats, inputlookup, outputlookup, correlation searches, notable events, data model acceleration, Splunk Enterprise Security.
auto-video: Generating videos via ComfyUI/Wan2.2, describing video concepts, scene composition.
auto-vision: Image understanding, visual analysis, multimodal tasks with attached images, diagram interpretation, object recognition, screenshot analysis.
tools-specialist: Direct tool invocation and MCP server operations: file system access, git operations, code execution, fetch, Docker management — use when you need raw tool access, not an AI workspace.
